native_stderr_capture.note: Native XLA CPU AOT warnings, if emitted, are redirected here to keep terminal output compact.

captured_final_carry.t_2ave_minus_300.name: captured_final_carry.t_2ave_minus_300
captured_final_carry.t_2ave_minus_300.offset_convention: OperationalCarry.t_2ave is stored with the total-theta offset restored; subtract 300 K for perturbation comparison.

captured_final_carry.t_2ave_raw.name: captured_final_carry.t_2ave_raw
captured_final_carry.t_2ave_raw.offset_convention: Raw diagnostic only; production storage includes the 300 K offset and should not be compared directly to WRF T.

captured_final_carry.t_save_minus_300.name: captured_final_carry.t_save_minus_300
captured_final_carry.t_save_minus_300.offset_convention: OperationalCarry.t_save is stored as total theta (see _carry_from_finished_stage); subtract 300 K.

captured_post_halo_carry.state.theta_min.name: captured_post_halo_carry.state.theta_minus_300
captured_post_halo_carry.state.theta_min.offset_convention: State.theta is total theta; post-halo is not the green WRF target but is a plausible wrong source.

captured_pre_halo_state.theta_minus_300.name: captured_pre_halo_state.theta_minus_300
captured_pre_halo_state.theta_minus_300.offset_convention: State.theta is total theta; WRF history T is perturbation theta, so subtract 300 K.

checkpoint_prestep_carry.state.theta_min.name: checkpoint_prestep_carry.state.theta_minus_300
checkpoint_prestep_carry.state.theta_min.offset_convention: State.theta is total theta; subtract 300 K.
checkpoint_prestep_carry.state.theta_min.stage: checkpoint completed step 5999 before target step 6000

checkpoint_prestep_carry.t_2ave_minus_30.name: checkpoint_prestep_carry.t_2ave_minus_300
checkpoint_prestep_carry.t_2ave_minus_30.offset_convention: OperationalCarry.t_2ave is stored with the 300 K offset restored; subtract 300 K.
checkpoint_prestep_carry.t_2ave_minus_30.stage: checkpoint small-step scratch before target step 6000

checkpoint_prestep_carry.t_2ave_raw.name: checkpoint_prestep_carry.t_2ave_raw
checkpoint_prestep_carry.t_2ave_raw.offset_convention: Raw diagnostic only; included to prove an offset mistake is not the hidden match.
checkpoint_prestep_carry.t_2ave_raw.stage: checkpoint small-step scratch diagnostic before target step 6000

checkpoint_prestep_carry.t_save_minus_30.name: checkpoint_prestep_carry.t_save_minus_300
checkpoint_prestep_carry.t_save_minus_30.offset_convention: OperationalCarry.t_save is total theta; subtract 300 K.
checkpoint_prestep_carry.t_save_minus_30.stage: checkpoint save family before target step 6000

physics_state.theta_minus_300.name: physics_state.theta_minus_300
physics_state.theta_minus_300.offset_convention: State.theta is total theta; this checks a possible cadence/source confusion before the dycore.

next_decision: Open a theta-evolution localization sprint; do not spend the next sprint on JAX-vs-WRF history source remapping for `T`.

tolerance.policy: No artificial tolerance widening; inherited from the canonical h10 proof.

unresolved_risks: Only Boole's selected h10 patch was compared; this attributes the first mismatch, not full-domain parity.
The proof is CPU-only and intentionally does not run TOST or Switzerland validation.
verdict_reason: No inspected JAX theta/history candidate matches WRF history T or WRF T_THM within the frozen tolerance.

wrf_thm_side__MASS_K1_T_THM.description: WRF THM-side candidate; not the accepted history T source.

wrf_target.target_surface: post dyn_em/solve_em.F::after_all_rk_steps state before RK halo exchanges
